disclaimer: Crypto 24h forecasts scored vs a random-walk baseline. Direction: lower Brier is better; skillVsRandomWalk = 0.25 - our Brier (positive = better than a coin flip; shown even when negative). Band: empirical coverage of the 80% interval (target 0.80). Analytics only, not advice. Per-coin claims need many more samples (majors are highly correlated) — read the aggregate.
